# HIDDeviceClient.Notification.elementUpdates(values:)

**Case**

A notification that elements of the device were updated.

## Declaration

```swift
case elementUpdates(values: [HIDElement.Value])
```

## Parameters

- **values**: The updated values.

## Discussion

This is typically received in response to input reports, and is another way to receive the data in a different format than [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/Notification/inputReport(id:data:timestamp:)].
